heading: Conceptual Print Design
description: Conceptual print design exploring famine awareness, inspired by Oxfam's “Be Humankind” campaign and visual language.
text: This university project explores famine awareness through a conceptual print campaign. The work draws on the visual language of Oxfam's 'Be Humankind' initiative, using its tone and structure as a foundation to develop a compelling and emotive piece.

A bold headline and striking imagery—featuring blood-stained hands—create an immediate visual impact. The perspective places responsibility on the viewer, reinforcing the message and encouraging an emotional response.
